## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, passwords, or local `.env` values are committed.
- [ ] New API mutations validate input and authorize the current user.
- [ ] Client code does not access server-only credentials.
